body:
Hey %contact_first_name%,

I noticed you were checking out homes recently — are you still thinking about buying this year?
The market’s been shifting, and there are some great new opportunities available.

You can see the latest homes that match your search here:
👉 [%custom_ylopo_listing_alert%]

Let me know what’s caught your eye lately.
subject: Re: Still thinking about making a move to Las Vegas, %contact_first_name%?
